country_attribution: multi (b): a video is counted in every country whose search surfaced it; no per-country ranking (unreliable)

top_videos_by_views.title: Haaland Didn’t Understand the Lollipop 🍭💀 #parody #football #haaland #norway
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This surreal parody video featuring Haaland has resonated with audiences across Latin America and Spain. Viewers are entertained by the humor, though some express confusion regarding the AI-generated elements.

top_videos_by_views.title: Footballers Crazy Dap VS Ronaldo
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This video featuring Ronaldo's viral dap has trended in multiple regions, sparking a passionate debate between Messi and Ronaldo fans. While the sentiment is largely positive, some viewers criticize the use of fake sound effects.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ロナウドの挨拶動画が各地でトレンド入りし、メッシとロナウドのファンによる議論を呼んでいます。全体的な評価は高いものの、一部からは不自然な効果音に対する批判も上がっています。

top_videos_by_views.title: Mbappé Watched the Drink Disappear 🥤😭 #parody #football #haaland #worldcup
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This parody video showcases high production quality but has triggered mixed reactions globally. While many praise the humor, others are concerned by inconsistencies and counting errors linked to AI generation.

top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This analysis of Ronaldo's penalty technique has drawn significant criticism from viewers. Many expressed skepticism regarding the validity of the claims and dissatisfaction with the content's framing.
